jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer, Operations Research
Lead AI Engineer + Agent Builder + Platform Engineer
jobs.location: Remote (US), Full-time / Part-time / Contract, https://catalystwayfare.ai/careers AI transformation firm shipping production AI systems for mid-market enterprises in regulated and technical domains — finance, energy, industrials, healthcare. We do not stop at PowerPoint AI strategy. We ship working systems alongside our clients' engineering teams. Small teams, deep expertise, real autonomy on real work. Hiring: [1] Lead AI Engineer, Agentic Systems — Embedded technical lead on a multi-agent orchestration build for one of the country's leading power engineering firms. Architect the engine; design the patterns we replicate at the next client. 6+ yrs eng, 2+ shipping LLM/agentic systems in production. Strong Python; opinions on agent frameworks. Monthly US travel to one major metro. https://catalystwayfare.ai/jd-lead [2] AI Engineer, Agent Builder — Hands-on builder embedded on the same engagement. End-to-end ownership of individual capability agents — prompts, tools, retrieval, evals, monitoring. 3–5 yrs strong Python, real production LLM API experience, shipped at least one agent system end-to-end. 1099 contract, ~30–40 hrs/wk. Occasional US travel. https://catalystwayfare.ai/jd-builder [3]Platform Manager (Engineering), Trust.ML — Founding platform engineer on our productized governance, evaluation, and deployment surface. Own the roadmap, write the code, set the operational posture (SLOs, on-call, audit). 5+ yrs, prior engineer-in-charge experience. Quarterly US travel. Compensation competitive with senior platform roles at venture-funded AI infrastructure companies; equity reflects the founding nature of the seat. https://catalystwayfare.ai/jd-platform Stack: Claude + OpenAI + Gemini + Perplexity APIs in production, open-source models when the math points there. Cursor and Claude Code daily. Vercel, Neon, Sentry. Evals as first-class artifacts. Apply: per each JD's instructions, to talent+hn@cwai.co. Short cover note matters more than a resume.

jobs.title: Founding ML/Data Engineer
jobs.location: REMOTE (UK only, + London WeWork a few days/month), Full-time, £70k–£100k + up to 1% equity We're an AI agent that automates pricing and promotions for short-term rental operators on Booking.com and Airbnb. Bootstrapped to real revenue, recently funded, small team. Pitch: we sit on Booking.com private API data, Airbnb channel data, and scraped competitive pricing across thousands of properties. Our agent is rules-based where it should be data-driven. You'd be the founding ML/data hire fixing exactly that. You're a fit if you: * Ship clean production Python in a Django codebase, not just notebooks * Think in experiments and know correlation from causation (time series a plus) * Use frontier AI coding tools/agents to ship fast * Have startup experience and thrive in ambiguity Stack: Python, pandas, scikit-learn, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Django, time series, causal inference, AI agents. Email me at martin@mydatavalue.com.

jobs.title: Analytics Engineer
jobs.location: REMOTE CST (Philippines, Costa Rica, US), Full-time Contract We're hiring an Analytics Engineer to help power our future. This is a really greenfield project where we need to define the data models that fuel all reporting, analytics, and ML/AI going forward. We do 'freight audit' - we save our clients money by making sure all their logistics spend is correct and as agreed. At Trax, our data infrastructure is in the middle of a real transformation. We're building the data foundation that will power our next wave of AI features, and we need someone who can own that work end-to-end. This isn't a "run queries and make charts" role. You'll be: - Designing and maintaining data marts in dbt + Snowflake - Building customer-facing dashboards that integrate into our platform - Bridging the gap between engineering, business ops, and client teams - Running ad-hoc analyses that drive real decisions - Shaping how our data platform evolves alongside our AI/ML capabilities What matters most to us: - Deep data modeling knowledge (domain logic, not just syntax) - Advanced SQL; dbt and Snowflake experience is a big bonus - Strong communicator who translates between technical and non-technical worlds - A learning mindset; genuinely non-negotiable for us We're a small, close team. You won't disappear into a large org. You'll work directly with leadership, partner with Solutions and Sales, and have a real voice in how we build. If you thrive on ownership, are energized by complexity, and want to see the direct impact of your work, let's talk! My email and linkedIn are in my profile.
